description:
Return a list of all Images from a Project's Photo Album (Image Category).

See [Filtering on List Actions](https://developers.procore.com/documentation/filtering-on-list-actions) for information on using the filtering capabilities provided by this endpoint.

parameters.name: image_category_id
parameters.description: Optional. ID of the image category to filter the images by.

parameters.name: filters[log_date]
parameters.description: Date of Photos added to the Daily Log in the format "YYYY-MM-DD", or a range of dates in the format "YYYY-MM-DD...YYYY-MM-DD".

parameters.name: filters[private]
parameters.description: If true, returns only item(s) with a `private` status.

parameters.name: filters[starred]
parameters.description: If true, returns only item(s) with a `starred` status.

parameters.name: filters[location_id]
parameters.description: Location ID. Returns item(s) with the specified Location ID or a range of Location IDs.

parameters.name: filters[trade_ids]
parameters.description: Array of Trade IDs. Returns item(s) with the specified Trade IDs.

parameters.name: filters[projection]
parameters.description: Return items with the specified projection type.

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: filters[uploader_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) uploaded by the specified User IDs

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field to sort by. If the field is passed with a - (EX: -created_at) it is sorted in reverse order

parameters.name: serializer_view
parameters.description:
The data set that should be returned from the serializer.
The normal view includes default fields, plus links, comments_count, trades.
The android view includes default fields, plus trades, comment...

updated_at.description: Timestamp of last update to Location

deleted_at.description: Timestamp when the segment was soft deleted

deleted.description: Indicates if the segment is deleted

self.description: A link back to the current resource

update.description: A link to the update endpoint for the resource

delete.description: A link to the delete endpoint for the resource

permanentlyDelete.description: A link to the permanent delete endpoint for the resource

retrieve.description: A link to the retrieve endpoint for the resource

comments_count.description: the number of comments on this image
